title: Treerific
description: INDEV-This mod adds a variety of trees and wood types to minecraft!
body:
## v0.9.0-1.21.1 - INDEV - Pine Update ->> I apologize for the multiple versions of 0.9.0 posted, that was a mistake on my end due to wifi when I was uploading it.

**I highly recommend downloading the latest version of the mod.**

###  **ALL VERSIONS v0.4.0 AND LATER REQUIRE TERRABLENDER**


**Treerific** is an expanding mod that introduces new and unique tree types to Minecraft. **Treerific** is currently in its InDev phase of life.

Current Trees:

**Stonewood**

**Elm**

**Redwood**

**Sequoia**

**Amethystwood**

**Maple**

**Pine**


Planned Trees: 

**Beech**

**Fir**

**Palm**


This mod is just the beginning! Future updates will expand the Treerific world with new species like Fir and Beech, each with their own biome. Please note that Treerific is a work in progress, and there may be minor bugs or unfinished features as development continues. Feedback and suggestions are always welcome — help shape the forest of the future!

🌲 Grow your world, one tree at a time.
